name: rolnopol-app

scripts.greenhouse:test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test vitest run tests/unit/greenhouse.service.test.js tests/unit/greenhouse.tick-engine.test.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=test vitest run tests/greenhouse-grpc.test.js tests/greenhouse-rest.test.js tests/greenhouse-pages-gating.test.js
scripts.tasklab:test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test vitest run tests/unit/tasklab.service.test.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=test vitest run tests/tasklab-grpc.test.js tests/tasklab-rest.test.js tests/tasklab-pages-gating.test.js

author: Rolnopol
